# TASK-001: Build MCP Server

**Status:** In Progress
**Added:** 2026-03-01

## Description
Implement the Layer 5 MCP server with full-text search, structured queries, and knowledge graph.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All 6 tools registered and working
- FTS5 search returning highlighted excerpts
- Token-budgeted recall with 3 strategies
- References ADR-0001 for compatibility requirements
